name: Full Integration Gate
purpose: Run the complete repository and package suite against the sealed Accepted Change Package before integration.

oracle.description: Syntax checks and every repository test must exit zero for the current sealed acceptance subject.

rejects: missing or non-executable packaged CLI entrypoints
unresolved or tampered Outcome Contributions and Outcome exceptions accepted without frozen Development Plan authority

residualUncertainty: Local tests do not establish authenticated provenance.
They do not provide OS sandboxing or production deployment assurance.
The local npm install does not exercise every supported platform or package manager.
A bound Outcome Contribution proves relevance only; Criterion satisfaction requires the separately compiled Outcome Transition proof and Plan-authority assessment.
Content-addressed Transition proof still trusts the local single-writer Change Store; it does not provide signed or authenticated multi-writer history.
